top3.sql:
SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON lt2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE strftime('%Y', d2.dob) = '1971'
  );

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON lt2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE strftime('%Y', d2.dob) = '1971'
  );

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND r.fastestLapTime = (
    SELECT MIN(r2.fastestLapTime)
    FROM results r2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON r2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE strftime('%Y', d2.dob) = '1971'
      AND r2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
  );

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    WHERE strftime('%Y', (SELECT dob FROM drivers WHERE driverId = lt2.driverId)) = '1971'
  )
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.code;

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON lt2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE strftime('%Y', d2.dob) = '1971'
  );

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND r.fastestLapTime = (
    SELECT MIN(r2.fastestLapTime)
    FROM results r2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON r2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE strftime('%Y', d2.dob) = '1971'
      AND r2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
  );

SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    WHERE strftime('%Y', (SELECT dob FROM drivers WHERE driverId = lt2.driverId)) = '1971'
  )
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.code;

final.sql:
SELECT d.driverId, d.code
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE strftime('%Y', d.dob) = '1971'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON lt2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE strftime('%Y', d2.dob) = '1971'
  );
